issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving double tasks in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were generating duplicate tasks across multiple workflows including pre-referral and post-referral. The issue was caused by a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. HubSpot support was engaged and confirmed the fix.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received double tasks during the impact window and manually delete duplicate tasks from their records.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs continued receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks for deals that had been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filters were not properly excluding these deal stages from triggering ongoing tasks. A filter tweak was applied on March 9th to address the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually unenroll any Closed Lost or Transferred deals that are still receiving tasks and discard any duplicate tasks generated during the impact window.

issues.title: LO change not reflected in automated agent emails — previous LO shown instead of updated one
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to display the previous LO's information instead of the newly assigned one. The affected deal showed the old LO Paul instead of the correct LO Julie Yocum. The issue was resolved by Luis and confirmed fixed on March 13th.
issues.workaround: For deals where an LO change occurred during the impact window, manually resend any agent-facing emails to ensure the correct LO information is communicated.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering for deals that cycled back to Offer Accepted after falling out
issues.desc: When a deal was marked Offer Accepted, then reverted to a prior stage after a contract fall-through, and then moved back to Offer Accepted again, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was missing from the workflow's re-enrollment criteria. The re-enrollment criteria was updated by Madelaine Davis on March 16th.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that cycled back to Offer Accepted during the impact window to ensure TCs received the correct closing tasks.

issues.title: MRC deals marked Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow, resulting in TCs not receiving tasks to collect closing information. The issue affected multiple MRC deals with no lender assigned, though the no-lender state was not confirmed as the root cause. HubSpot support was contacted and confirmed the issue was fixed on April 1st.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted between approximately March 14th and April 1st into the TC workflow and send closing information collection emails manually.
